channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: SpaceX jumps 11% on debut after record U.S. IPO
item.description: SpaceX shares rose 11% in early trading Friday, making it one of the top 10 largest U.S. companies by market cap.

item.title: Iranian foreign minister says deal with U.S. "never been closer"
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said Friday that an agreement with the U.S. to extend the ceasefire, reopen the Strait of Hormuz and launch ne...

item.title: Mystery orb videos, other UFO records released by White House
item.description: The Trump administration released a sweeping cache of government records and videos Friday that include colorful UFO-like orbs flying across the sky i...

item.title: America approaches 250 with its best days in doubt
item.description: Most Americans say the country's best days are behind it as the U.S. approaches its 250th birthday , even as they're personally hopeful about the futu...
